step.name: init
step.action: Run pnpm create express; pin TS + Node.

step.name: wire-middleware
step.action: Apply middleware in canonical order: helmet → cors → compression → pinoHttp → rate-limit → body parsers → routes → error handler.

step.name: wire-routes
step.action: Add route files; each delegates to a service layer.

step.name: wire-error-handler
step.action: Central middleware: map known errors (ValidationError, AuthError) to status; default to 500.
step.decision-gate: If errors not enumerated, escalate; do not emit a generic catch-all.

step.name: wire-shutdown
step.action: Bind SIGINT + SIGTERM; close server + DB pool with timeout.
